ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT CHARLES DUNN REAL ESTATE SERVICES, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR OCT-14-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHARLES DUNN REAL ESTATE SERVICES, INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OVERRULED AS TO FIRST, SECOND, TENTH, ELEVENTH, TWELFTH, THIRTEENTH AND FOURTEENTH CAUSES OF ACTION, SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIFTH, SIXTH, SEVENTH AND EIGHTH CAUSES OF ACTION, AND SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES THAT DEFENDANT PURPOSEFULLY ATTEMPTED TO DRIVE PLAINTIFF FROM THE PREMISES WITHOUT JUST CAUSE AFTER SHE COMPLAINED OF HABITABILITY DEFECTS. PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE TO PLEAD A CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP OR A THIRD PARTY BENEFICIARY THEORY OF RECOVERY. THE FOURTH PURPORTED CAUSE OF ACTION DOES NOT STATE A VIABLE INDEPENDENT CLAIM. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Dec-16-2011 Continued To Feb-17-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHARLES DUNN REAL ESTATE SERVICES, INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Jacqueline Ravenscroft of Bracamontes & Vlasak (835.6777) for plaintiff and responding party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: overruled as to first, second, tenth, eleventh, twelfth, thirteenth and fourteenth causes of action, sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the fifth, sixth, seventh and eighth causes of action, and sustained without leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action. The amended complaint sufficiently alleges that defendant purposefully attempted to drive plaintiff from the premises without just cause after she complained of habitability defects. Plaintiff has leave to plead a contractual relationship or a third party beneficiary theory of recovery. The fourth purported cause of action does not state a viable independent claim. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported

Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHARLES DUNN REAL ESTATE SERVICES, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Jacqueline Ravenscroft of Bracamontes & Vlasak (835.6777) for plaintiff and responding party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied in its entirety. The challenged allegations are adequately pled. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
